title: Full Optymize
description: A performance modpack which gives a big increase in FPS
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11e0f9466e1d589ce8658f9202de2862a9f9c197.png) [](https://modrinth.com/modpack/full-optymize/)
**A lightweight performance-focused modpack designed to make Minecraft run as smooth and fast as possible. Featuring powerful optimization mods like Embeddium, ImmediatelyFast, and FerriteCore, this pack focuses purely on improving FPS, reducing lag, and cutting memory usage — without changing vanilla gameplay.** No extra content. No new biomes or mobs. Just pure performance. ### Key Features: - Higher and more stable FPS - Reduced memory usage and faster world loading - Optimized chunk rendering and entity processing - Fully compatible with most client-side mods - Lightweight and easy to install Perfect for players who want a smooth vanilla experience on any PC — from low-end laptops to high-end rigs. ### Included Mods: - Embeddium & Embeddium Extra – next-gen Sodium for Forge - CullLeaves & EntityCulling – smarter rendering, fewer draw calls - Dynamic FPS – saves performance when the game is unfocused - FerriteCore, ModernFix, Memory Leak Fix – memory and stability improvements - ImmediatelyFast, GPUTape – GPU rendering optimizations - Forgified Fabric API, Kotlin for Forge, Lazurite, MidnightLib – required libraries
[Discord](https://discord.gg/TczWh6hW48)
